top_signals.title: India Rate Setters See Outlook Improve as Middle East Risks Ease
top_signals.summary: India’s rate setters chose to stay growth-supportive and hold off on any policy pivot, viewing Middle East uncertainty as a reason for caution while expecting the economic outlook to improve rapidly once tensions ease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fogo de Chao nominated for Best Casual Dining Toast award
top_signals.summary: We have launched the Toast the City awards 2026 and throughout the year we’ll be speaking to some of our nominees – this week it’s Brazilian restaurant Fogo de Chao at Bishopsgate. To vote for your favourite Square Mile spots for the 2026 awards, from bars and restaurants to galleries and green spaces, visit the [...]

top_signals.title: AllUnity debuts SEKAU, a fully reserved Swedish krona stablecoin
top_signals.summary: AllUnity launches Swedish krona-backed stablecoin SEKAU with multi-chain support, expanding its stablecoin portfolio regulated under the EU’s MiCA framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: Supertankers With 80 Million Barrels of Oil Ready to Pass Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
